seoTitle: Lorne vs Lorquon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lorne and Lorquon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lorne and Lorquon.
heading: Lorne vs Lorquon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lorne, Victoria and Lorquon, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lorquon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lorne (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lorne or Lorquon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lorne has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Lorquon scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lorne scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Lorquon scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lorne or Lorquon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lorquon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
